# Which issue does this PR close?

<!--
We generally require a GitHub issue to be filed for all bug fixes and enhancements.
You can link an issue to this PR using the GitHub syntax. For example `Closes #123`
indicates that this PR will close issue #123.
-->

Closes #.

# Rationale for this change

<!--
Why are you proposing this change? If this is already explained clearly in the
issue then this section is not needed. Explaining clearly why changes are
proposed helps reviewers understand your changes and offer better suggestions.
-->

# What changes are included in this PR?

<!--
There is no need to duplicate the description in the issue here, but it is
sometimes worth providing a summary of the individual changes in this PR.
-->

# Are there any user-facing changes?

<!--
If there are user-facing changes then we may require documentation / examples
to be updated before approving the PR.
-->

<!--
If there are any breaking changes to public APIs (Rust or Python), please call
them out explicitly and consider adding a `breaking-changes` label.
-->

How did you verify this change? e.g. unit tests, `scripts/ci/*`, live GooseFS
Docker fixture, Python examples / benchmarks.
